meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Speed Up Development with Antigravity Template
content.seo_description: Stop slow development cycles. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship SaaS apps faster. An expert-level checklist for AI Builders.
content.answer_block: Slow development stems from redundant boilerplate and context switching. The Antigravity project template provides a production-ready, modular foundation that eliminates initial setup friction. By pairing this with Claude Code, you automate architectural decisions and boilerplate generation, allowing you to ship high-quality client deliverables in a fraction of the time.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your sprint, but you’re stuck in the mud of configuration files and dependency hell. Every hour spent wrestling with project structure is an hour stolen from your bottom line and your client's trust. You aren't paid to configure Webpack; you are paid to ship solutions that move the needle.

Relief has arrived in the form of the Antigravity template. It is the architectural equivalent of a pre-built skyscraper foundation, engineered for speed and scalability. Combined with the raw power of Claude Code, you can transform a simple requirement into a fully functional, production-grade feature set before your morning coffee cools.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root architecture to ensure modularity and type-safety from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new enterprise-grade SaaS project with Antigravity, including authentication, database ORM, and API route structure.

steps.title: Configure Domain-Driven Design (DDD)
steps.description: Organize your logic into business domains to prevent the 'spaghetti code' trap as the app grows.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the project structure to support domain-driven design, isolating user management and billing into separate modules.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "modularize project into domains: auth, billing, core"

steps.title: Automate Type-Safe API Endpoints
steps.description: Eliminate manual JSON parsing and interface mismatches by generating API contracts from the schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a CRUD API endpoint for the 'Project' model with full Zod validation and TypeScript interface generation.

steps.title: Integrate Production-Ready Middleware
steps.description: Secure your application layer with centralized rate limiting and authentication guards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a global middleware for rate limiting and JWT verification across all protected routes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "apply security middleware to all routes in /api/v1"

steps.title: Deploy the CI/CD Pipeline
steps.description: Automate testing and deployment to ensure your client sees progress without manual intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow for the Antigravity template that runs linting, testing, and deployment to Vercel.

pro_tips: Always use the 'dry-run' flag in Claude Code to review proposed file changes before committing to the repository.
Map your database schema in a single YAML file and let Antigravity generate the migration scripts to save hours of manual SQL writing.
Use custom 'system prompts' in your Claude Code config to enforce specific coding styles or architectural patterns across all your freelance projects.
Leverage the Antigravity 'hot-reload' feature during development to see UI changes instantly without re-compiling the entire backend.
Keep your prompt library in a local Notion database; reuse the exact same engineering patterns for every new client to maximize efficiency.
content.next_steps: Once your project is scaffolded, run a full integration test suite and invite your client to the staging environment for immediate feedback cycles.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start scaling your freelance business with the tools that elite developers use. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
